name: AssetOwl Limited
summary: AssetOwl Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the development of technology and software in Australia. It offers inspector360, photo-centric property management platform designed for residential real estate sector, which provides photographic record of the state of a property. The company also provides a cloud-based software services for real estate asset management to the residential, retail, and government property sectors. AssetOwl Limited was incorporated in 2006 and is based in Perth, Australia.
